data.description: JAPAN METEOROLOGICAL AGENCY REVISED MONDAY QUAKE TO MAGNITUDE 7.7 FROM 7.5, NHK SAYS

data.title: IGT Appoints Mark Wadley Incoming President of Land-Based Gaming
data.description: Mark Wadley has recently been appointed as IGT's upcoming President of Land-Based Gaming, effective April 20, 2026. The integration will cover various functions including product development, commercial strategies, and operational management. This move aims to lead a comprehensive gaming business approach.

data.title: Continuous Composites Expands Manufacturing Footprint to Support Production-Relevant CF3D Systems
data.description: Continuous Composites has recently revealed that it will be moving its operations to a larger facility located at 3875 N Schreiber Way, Coeur d'Alene, Idaho. The new facility spans over 17,000 square feet, indicating a significant increase compared to their previous manufacturing space. This move marks a major expansion for the company, allowing them to bolster their production capacity and resources significantly.

data.title: B2Gold Announces Agreement to Sell its 70% Interest in Fingold Joint Venture to Agnico Eagle for US$325 million; B2Gold and Agnico Eagle to Enter into Nunavut Collaboration Agreement
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 20, 2026, B2Gold Corp. (TSX: BTO, NYSE AMERICAN: BTG, NSX: B2G) announced a significant transaction. The company has finalized a deal with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited to sell its 70% stake in Fingold Ventures Ltd. for a total of US$325 million in cash. This agreement also includes the establishment of a collaboration agreement named the Nunavut Collaboration Agreement, focusing on their gold mining operations in Nunavut, Canada.

data.title: New International Banks Join Wallbox’s Financial Restructuring Plan
data.description: Wallbox N.V. (NYSE: WBX), a leading global provider of electric vehicle charging and energy management solutions, has successfully finalized its creditor accession process for the financial restructuring plan. Key creditors such as HSBC and Citibank have joined the plan, signaling widespread support from the financial sector. This development highlights the confidence in the Company's viability and strategic direction.

data.title: Ammonia Market worth $102.74 billion by 2031 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on April 20, 2026, a report by MarketsandMarkets highlighted the global forecast for the Ammonia Market. The market is segmented by type into Anhydrous and Aqueous, with sales channels including Direct and Indirect. Major end-use industries for ammonia include Agriculture, Textile, Refrigeration, Mining, and Pharmaceutical sectors. The forecast extends until 2031, with significant growth potential projected for the market.

data.title: Shareholder Alert: Ademi LLP investigates whether TopBuild Corp. is obtaining a Fair Price for Public Shareholders
data.description: An investigation into TopBuild (NYSE: BLD) is being conducted by Ademi LLP based in Milwaukee, starting April 20, 2026. The probe aims to uncover potential breaches of fiduciary duty and other legal violations in the company's recent deal with QXO. Those interested in participating in the investigation and seeking further details can find more information by clicking on the specified link.

data.title: Milvus Robotics Introduces the SEIT F1500S Forklift-Type Autonomous Mobile Robot for Advanced Material Handling
data.description: In Atlanta on April 20, 2026, Milvus Robotics unveiled the SEIT F1500S, a cutting-edge stacker-type fork autonomous mobile robot (AMR) designed to revolutionize material handling in dynamic manufacturing environments. The SEIT F1500S promises to bring a new level of efficiency and productivity with its advanced automation technology.

data.title: Company poised to progress PTSD treatment as Trump issues order to boost research & treatment with psychedelic drugs.
data.description: A recent study indicates that the unemployment rate in the United States has risen to 6.1%, with approximately 9.8 million individuals currently without jobs. This increase is primarily attributed to the ongoing COVID-19 pandemic and its impact on the economy. The sectors most affected by job losses include hospitality, retail, and transportation. The government is working towards implementing measures to boost job creation and support those struggling with unemployment during these challenging times.

data.title: Ushio Industry & Entertainment Appoints Takuya Matsumoto as President & CEO and Outlines Strategic Direction for the Next Phase
data.description: In Berlin, Ushio Industry & Entertainment (Ushio INE GmbH) has appointed Takuya Matsumoto as President and CEO. This move signifies a significant step in the company's growth and alignment with the Ushio Group. Matsumoto, with over two decades of experience in sales, new business development, and global operations, is well-equipped to lead the company forward. His successful tenure in Ushio includes notable achievements. Matsumoto's appointment marks a pivotal moment in the company's journey towards progress and innovation.

data.title: Innovative Industrial Properties Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: A real estate investment company, Innovative Industrial Properties, Inc. (IIP) (NYSE: IIPR), is set to release its first quarter 2026 results on May 4, 2026, after the close of trading on the New York Stock Exchange. Following this, a conference call will be held at 9:00 a.m. Pacific Time on May 5, 2026, where management will discuss the financial results and operations for the quarter. Investors can access the call through a live audio webcast on the Investor Relations section of the company's website.

data.title: Rupert Resources to Be Acquired by Agnico Eagle
data.description: Rupert Resources Ltd. has announced a definitive arrangement agreement with Agnico Eagle Mines Limited. Agnico Eagle is set to buy all outstanding common shares of Rupert through a plan of arrangement. The Agreement involves Agnico Eagle acquiring the Rupert Shares it does not already own. Agnico Eagle Mines Limited is listed on the NYSE as AEM and TSX as AEM. The deal outlines the acquisition of all outstanding shares and signifies a significant move in the mining sector.

data.title: Grovecourt Capital Partners with Guide Architecture to Accelerate Growth in Healthcare Design
data.description: A private equity firm, Grovecourt Capital, has revealed its recent investment in Guide Architecture, a healthcare-centered architecture and planning company situated in Dallas. Established in 2014, Guide Architecture concentrates on creating designs for medical facilities like hospitals, outpatient centers, behavioral health facilities, and medical offices. Catering to prominent health systems all over the United States, Guide Architecture's partnership with Grovecourt Capital signifies a significant move in the industry.

data.title: Trane Technologies to Present at the Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference
data.description: Trane Technologies plc (NYSE: TT), a leading global climate innovator, is scheduled to participate in a fireside chat at the Oppenheimer Industrial Growth Conference on May 5, 2026, at 11:15 a.m. ET. Interested individuals can tune in to the live webcast on the company's website, www.tranetechnologies.com, in the investor relations section. The webcast will also be archived for 30 days post-event.

data.title: Walker & Dunlop Arranges $105 Million Loan to Refinance Luxury Raleigh Community
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland, Walker & Dunlop facilitated a $105 million refinancing deal for Maeve, a recently completed upscale high-rise complex with 297 units located in Raleigh's Warehouse District.
